OPPOSITION TO MOTION FOR HEARING FOR EXTENSION OF TIME TO COMPLETE ARBITRATION FILED BY DEFENDANT CARROLL, DOUG

PLAINTIFF THOMAS LUTGE'S MOTION FOR EXTENSION OF TIME TO COMPLETE ARBITRATION IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE NOR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. THE ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION IS EXTENDED TO 6/29/2007. THE ARBITRATION OSC IS RE-SET TO 7/24/2007 AT 1:30 PM, IN DEPARTMENT 212. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: FLOYD L. BUTLER, CSR#2518. (212)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Hearing For Extension Of Time To Complete Arbitration

MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Thomas Lutge's Motion for extension of time to complete arbitration is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Order signed. The Arbitrator's jurisdiction is extended to 6/29/2007. The Arbitration OSC is re-set to 7/24/2007 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Floyd L. Butler, CSR#2518. (212)
